utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final plan. Check full specification: Each requires the coverage type and costs. health_coverage specifies physical and mental health insurance with plan names and monthly costs (€105 and €60). property_coverage provides home/contents insurance with a plan name and monthly cost (€90). travel_coverage has plan name and monthly cost (€115). additional_services lists 'None' and mentions an optional service; cost is effectively none, which is acceptable. total_budget provides a monthly total (€370/month). All items include costs and are specified, so all are fully covered.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists four selections: (1) Physical Health Insurance: InsurePlus Standard Plan, (2) Mental Health Insurance: InsurePlus Standard Plan, (3) PrimeHome Premium Coverage for property, and (4) PrimeTravel Premium Plan for travel. From the ground-truth ratings: Primary health physical -> InsurePlus Standard Plan has rating 10. Primary health mental -> InsurePlus Standard Plan has rating 7. Property protection home_content -> PrimeHome Premium Coverage has rating 3. Mobility coverage travel_insurance -> PrimeTravel Premium Plan has rating 3.
